csvImport.spaceNumberInvalid: spaceNumber must be a positive whole number.
csvImport.unsupportedColumns: CSV has unsupported column(s): {{columns}}. Use firstName, lastName, homeRoom, and optional spaceNumber.
csvImport.willCreateStudent: Will create a new student record.
csvImport.willUpdateSpace: Will update the parking space for the matching student.
csvImport.xlsxUnsupported: XLSX import is not enabled yet. Please download the CSV template and upload a .csv file.
